message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in loaders.py (get_source/list_templates). Need to know if your feature also touches this file so we can split cleanly.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (path_transform param) touches BaseLoader, FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader - essentially the whole loaders.py file. What file(s) does your feature touch? If also loaders.py, let's figure out a way to split or sequence edits.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__, get_source, list_templates only - additive fallback_searchpath support)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, and FileSystemLoader path_transform additions)
note: We both must touch loaders.py so a disjoint file split isn't possible. Proposing sequencing instead: my change to FileSystemLoader is small and additive (new optional fallback_searchpath param + 2 method tweaks). I'll go first and send DONE with the exact diff. You then layer your path_transform changes on top (including into FileSystemLoader) around my edits. This avoids us both editing __init__ signature simultaneously and clobbering each other. Sound OK? Reply ACCEPT and I'll start immediately.

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features touch loaders.py broadly (mine: path_transform param on BaseLoader/FileSystemLoader/PackageLoader/DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader; yours: fallback_searchpath on FileSystemLoader). We can't be fully disjoint, so let's minimize line overlap in FileSystemLoader specifically: I'll append 'path_transform' as the LAST kwarg in each __init__ signature (after your fallback_searchpath if you add yours first in the list), and my only change inside each get_source/get_loader body is ONE line at the very top applying the transform (e.g. 'if self.path_transform is not None: template = self.path_transform(template)' with original name preserved for TemplateNotFound). Please keep your fallback_searchpath logic appended AFTER the existing primary search loop in get_source (not rewriting it), and similarly append-only changes in list_templates. That way our diffs touch different lines. OK to proceed on this basis?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, and FileSystemLoader path_transform additions - layered on top of your fallback_searchpath changes)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader.__init__, get_source, list_templates - fallback_searchpath)
note: Agreed. Go ahead and implement + send DONE with your diff summary; I'll wait for that before touching FileSystemLoader, and will implement the other classes in the meantime.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader: add fallback_searchpath param appended before your path_transform kwarg in __init__; append fallback search AFTER primary loop in get_source; append fallback templates AFTER primary in list_templates)
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader path_transform; path_transform kwarg/line in FileSystemLoader appended after mine)
note: Agreed. I will only append code after existing primary search loops, not rewrite them, and add fallback_searchpath as a param before your path_transform in signatures. Starting now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader: fallback_searchpath param + get_source/list_templates fallback loops appended after primary loops)
note: Finished. Added fallback_searchpath as new kwarg right after followlinks in __init__ (before where you'd add path_transform), and self.fallback_searchpath = [] processing right after self.followlinks assignment. In get_source, added a second for-loop over fallback_searchpath appended directly before the final 'raise TemplateNotFound(template)' line - did not touch the existing primary loop. In list_templates, added a second for-loop over fallback_searchpath appended directly before 'return sorted(found)' - did not touch existing primary loop. All 40 existing loader tests pass plus my own manual verification. Should be clear for you to add path_transform now - just be aware my __init__ signature ends with '..., fallback_searchpath: ... = None) -> None:' so add your kwarg after that, and note there are now TWO 'raise TemplateNotFound(template)' related loops in get_source (primary then fallback) - if path_transform needs to apply to both, you may need to touch both loops or restructure into a shared helper. Let me know if you need me to adjust anything.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py (path_transform on BaseLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader, and FileSystemLoader)
note: Finished. In FileSystemLoader I added path_transform as the last __init__ kwarg (after followlinks - I don't have your fallback_searchpath change in my copy since we're apparently in separate repo instances, so I couldn't literally layer on top of your edit, but conceptually mine is a pure addition: transform template at top of get_source, wrap split_template_path in try/except to preserve original name in TemplateNotFound, and raise with original at the end). If our patches do get merged, my kwarg should slot in right after your fallback_searchpath param, and my try/except around split_template_path + 'raise TemplateNotFound(original)' at the end of the primary loop should compose fine with your appended fallback loop before the final raise - just make sure the fallback loop's final raise also uses 'original' if it wants transformed lookups to report the pre-transform name. All 40 existing loader tests still pass. Thanks for the clean split!
